# ppt-master Icon Vendor Attribution

This directory vendors icon assets from:

- Project: `hugohe3/ppt-master`
- Path: `skills/ppt-master/templates/icons`
- Source URL: `https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master`

Upstream notes indicate these SVG icons are sourced from SVG Repo:

- `https://www.svgrepo.com/`

Local usage in this repository:

- Icon lookup/index for minimax PPT rendering
- SVG-to-PNG rasterization for PPTX `addImage` compatibility
